setup: Use a PR previously reviewed with at least one finding, where the author has since pushed commits addressing it and autofix.ci has pushed a formatting commit. Substitute its number for <N>.
query: The author responded to my review and pushed new commits (one is from autofix.ci). Re-review rolldown/rolldown PR #<N> and decide.
expected_behavior: Diffs the new head against the previously reviewed head (git range-diff or equivalent) instead of re-reviewing from memory or trusting the author's reply alone
Treats the author's response as evidence: withdraws or narrows the satisfied finding only after rerunning the relevant proof
States whether the new head materially changes reviewed behavior, and runs a fresh proportional adversarial pass if it does
Re-pins the exact head immediately before publishing, accounting for possible further autofix.ci mutation
Approves per the Verdict rule when no blocker remains, and resolves satisfied threads only when authorized
Reads the submitted review back to confirm state, head, and comment placement, or presents the exact prepared output in read-only mode
